Package org.midheaven.math

Class Int32

java.lang.Object
org.midheaven.math.Int32
All Implemented Interfaces:
Comparable<Int>, LongOrdered, Ordered<Int>, Signed<Int>, AdditionGroup<Int>, AdditionMonoid<Int>, Int, MultiplicationMonoid<Int>
public final class Int32 extends Object implements Int
